title: High Protein Snacks On the Go (Trail Mix Packs)
metaDescription: High protein trail mix packs with 14g of protein per pouch — roasted chickpeas, nuts and seeds portioned for grab-and-go. No prep day-of.
targetKeywords: high protein snacks on the go
author: Recipe Team
keywords: high protein snacks on the go, trail mix, portable protein snack
ingredients: Small jars or resealable bags, for portioning

steps.name: Combine everything
steps.text: Mix roasted chickpeas, almonds, pumpkin seeds, dried cranberries, and dark chocolate chips in a large bowl.

steps.name: Portion into packs
steps.text: Divide evenly between 6 small jars or resealable bags — about 2/3 cup per pack.

steps.name: Store and grab
steps.text: Keep packs in the pantry or fridge. Grab one on the way out the door — no prep needed day-of.

tips.question: Why roasted chickpeas instead of plain?
tips.answer: Roasted chickpeas add crunch and about 6g of protein per half cup — plain canned chickpeas are soft and don't work in a dry trail mix.

tips.question: How long do these packs stay fresh?
tips.answer: Up to 2 weeks at room temperature in a sealed container, since everything in the mix is already dry or roasted.

tips.question: Can I swap in different nuts or dried fruit?
tips.answer: Yes — walnuts, cashews, or dried apricots all work as substitutes without changing the ratios.

tips.question: Is this mix nut-free adaptable?
tips.answer: Swap the almonds for extra pumpkin seeds or roasted chickpeas to keep it nut-free while keeping the protein content similar.

storyIntro: Most "on-the-go" snacks are really just a bar you grab at the store — this is the version you portion out yourself on a Sunday, so the whole week is already handled by Monday morning.
Roasted chickpeas do most of the protein work here, backed up by almonds and pumpkin seeds, with dried cranberries and dark chocolate keeping it from tasting like a health food.
storyNote: Portion it into packs the same day you make it, not after it's been sitting loose in a bag — pre-portioned packs are the entire point, since the whole appeal is grabbing one without measuring anything on a rushed morning.
